decisionPanels.title: Tonight's decision
decisionPanels.summary: Prioritize identity-led vertical publishing + faster metadata discipline; platforms are rewarding timeliness, originality, and recognizable journalist voices.
actions: Ship one journalist-led 9:16 cut per major story with explicit "why now" in first 2 seconds.
Add mandatory audience-query + entity + location metadata in Launcher before publish.
Track same-day velocity KPI: ingest-to-first-social-cut time and first-hour engagement quality.

decisionPanels.title: Ops stack watch (iconik/LucidLink/Backlight)
decisionPanels.summary: LucidLink Connect introduces a credible path to reduce duplicate data movement; Backlight direction remains automation + collaboration + social-ready throughput.
actions: Run a 1-week MMR spike to identify where linked-object access can replace duplicate copy handoffs.
Keep morning manual verification for iconik panel/agent/ISG + LucidLink release-note deltas (overnight anti-bot limits persist).
Prioritize approval-flow friction cuts and metadata automation before net-new tooling.

decisionPanels.title: Audience growth signal
decisionPanels.summary: YouTube and Meta both signal stronger AI-ranked discovery around original, timely video; newsroom growth depends on credible human identity plus fast packaging.
actions: Pilot crosspost model: journalist account + Guardian brand account with shared analytics review.
Use a fixed hook template and same-day publishing targets for every planned explainer package.
Add originality check in review: context/angle/voice must be additive, not reposted commodity.

items.title: iconik changelog hub (manual verification required; anti-bot blocking observed overnight)

Introducing LucidLink Connect: activate existing stores without migration, stream bytes on demand

YouTube 2026 priorities: creator-led entertainment, Shorts scale, expanded monetization tooling
Meta AI performance update: more same-day Reels, higher original content prevalence, stronger ranking
TikTok Discover List 2026: creator-format signal for emerging audience behavior
Newsrooms as talent hubs: distribution increasingly follows trusted journalist identities
2026 journalism prediction map: AI workflows, vertical video, and product strategy convergence
Backlight/iconik macro trend: scale + automation + vertical publishing acceleration

newItems.title: LucidLink Connect launch added as top ops-stack signal
YouTube 2026 strategy memo added (creator economy + Shorts scale)
Meta AI performance update added for ranking/originality implications
Nieman vertical-video talent-hub model elevated for newsroom operating design

changes.summary: Decision model moved from generic platform watch to concrete operating shifts: journalist identity-led distribution, same-day packaging speed, and reduced data-movement friction via linked storage access.
